summary: Release 2025.8 includes enhanced security features with multi-factor authentication, improved reporting capabilities with PDF export, search performance optimization, and critical bug fixes for email delivery and notification systems.

features.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
features.description: Users can now enable multi-factor authentication using email verification.

features.title: Export Dashboard Reports
features.description: Users can export dashboard reports to PDF format.

enhancements.title: Improved Search Performance
enhancements.description: Reduced search response times across the portal.

bugFixes.title: Password Reset Email Failure
bugFixes.description: Resolved an issue where password reset emails were not sent to some users.

bugFixes.title: Duplicate Notifications
bugFixes.description: Fixed an issue causing duplicate notifications to be displayed.

technicalTasks.title: Database Index Optimization
technicalTasks.description: Optimized database indexes for improved query performance.

technicalTasks.title: Upgrade Logging Framework
technicalTasks.description: Upgraded logging libraries to the latest version.
